title: Shovels Permit Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for Shovels building permit objects

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the permit lifecycle

fields.name: issue_date
fields.description: Date the permit was issued in YYYY-MM-DD format

fields.name: final_date
fields.description: Date the permit was finalized or closed

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-text description of the permitted construction work

fields.name: job_value
fields.description: Estimated dollar value of the permitted job

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Standardized permit classification tags (solar, roofing, hvac, adu, electrical, plumbing, etc.)

fields.name: address
fields.description: Property address where work is permitted

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: Name of the jurisdiction that issued the permit

fields.next_cursor: Opaque token for requesting the next page of results
fields.size: Number of items in the current response page

total_count.relation: Whether value is exact (eq) or lower bound (gte)
